tailorExplanation.paragraph: I treated this as a Data Engineer at Mayzax Solutions draft and made data, SQL, and amazon web services easy to find. You already had the right raw material: data, SQL, amazon web services, and PostgreSQL. I pushed that proof forward in Centi – Personal Finance App. Prove people-facing sales readiness through communication, outreach-adjacent service work, revenue-adjacent impact, and truthful product interest. I trimmed Taylor.io – Resume Builder & Parser, SecureScape – Smart Security System, and ShelfVision - Dense Shelf Object Detection because they were weaker signals for this read. The biggest help here: kept the projects that best prove the role fit, reframed your experience around the job's strongest signals, and gave the summary a clearer role-specific angle. Under the hood, I changed the summary, experience, projects, skills, and which sections show based on those signals.

details.title: What I prioritized
items: Prove people-facing sales readiness through communication, outreach-adjacent service work, revenue-adjacent impact, and truthful product interest.
I prioritized customer communication, people-facing work, revenue-adjacent metrics, relationship handling, sales readiness, and domain-relevant product interest.

details.title: Why it changed
items: Target story: Proven experience in building data pipelines and backend services, with strong skills in Python, SQL, and PostgreSQL.
Main evidence themes: data processing, ETL pipelines, and backend services.

details.title: Summary choice
items: I showed the professional summary because the summary can connect the candidate's experience to the role's requirements and highlight relevant skills.

details.title: What I spotlighted
items: BitGo Software Engineering Intern
Centi – Personal Finance App

details.title: What I trimmed
items: Taylor.io – Resume Builder & Parser
SecureScape – Smart Security System
ShelfVision - Dense Shelf Object Detection
Tizirsso Racing – Portfolio & Sponsorship Website
SentimentTrader - Real-Time Stock Sentiment Pipeline
NumPy
AWS (EC2)
AI-Driven Workflows

details.title: Related evidence
items: data engineering: related evidence includes etl, sql, and schemas.

details.title: Not directly evidenced
items: I did not claim git, Google Cloud Platform, azure, kafka, airflow, data engineering, certification support, and kaf because I could not verify that exact experience in the resume.

details.title: Before you send
items: Do not call the candidate a sales professional unless formal sales or outreach....
I treated git, google cloud platform, azure, kaf as review items, not resume claims, because I could not verify them in the resume.
Related evidence can support the broader story, but not exact ownership of git, g.
Some JD terms were not directly evidenced: git, google cloud platform, azure, and kafka.
Review the skills list; a few useful-but-lower-priority skills may have been trimmed.

jobStrategy.readerGoal: Prove people-facing sales readiness through communication, outreach-adjacent service work, revenue-adjacent impact, and truthful product interest.
claimRules: Do not call the candidate a sales professional unless formal sales or outreach....
Do not claim unsupported terms directly: git, google cloud platform, azure, kaf...
Exact tools/platforms stay as review gaps unless resume evidence exists: git, g...
Do not claim certification support unless directly evidenced.
summaryGuardrails: Do not make technical projects sound like sales proof.
Use coachable/readiness language instead of expert claims.

subsections.Relevant Coursework: Massive Storage & Big Data, Enterprise Computing, Object-Oriented Software Design
subsections.Honors & Awards: Dean’s List 2021, President’s Honor Roll 2023 – 2025, Pegasus Gold Scholarship
subsections.Clubs & Extracurriculars: AI @ UCF, Knight Hacks, SHPE @ UCF

experience.title: Software Engineering Intern
experience.description:
• Built REST APIs in Python/Django to support secure data workflows for financial compliance, improving operational efficiency.
• Collaborated with senior engineers on system design and architecture, contributing to scalable service patterns and data modeling.
• Developed React dashboards integrated with Django APIs, enhancing visibility into backend data workflows and operational metrics.
• Optimized Python data-processing pipelines and PostgreSQL queries, achieving a ~40% reduction in latency.
experience.skills: Python, Django, React, PostgreSQL, AWS EC2

experience.title: Server
experience.description:
• Adapting to high-pressure situations and thriving under stress.
• Effective communication with guests, kitchen, and bar teams.
• Working seamlessly in fast-paced collaborative environments.

experience.title: Host / Expo
experience.description:
• Attention to detail in every order for consistent quality.
• Clear communication with customers, kitchen, and delivery teams.
• Direct impact on business revenue - managing ~35% of store sales.

projects.title: Centi – Personal Finance App
projects.description:
• Developed a full-stack finance application that automates account aggregation and transaction tracking, providing insights through a unified dashboard.
• Designed FastAPI services and PostgreSQL schemas for Plaid integrations, ensuring reliable transaction processing.
• Created responsive React interfaces for user account management and financial analytics, improving user engagement.
• Implemented secure data handling protocols (OAuth/JWT) to protect sensitive financial information.

summary.summary: Data Engineer with proven expertise in building scalable data pipelines and backend services. Proficient in Python, SQL, and PostgreSQL, with hands-on experience in developing ETL processes and optimizing data workflows. Committed to transforming complex data into actionable insights through innovative engineering practices.

summary.before: Full-stack engineer specializing in scalable data pipelines, platforms, and backend services. Skilled in React, Python, and Java, with strong database and API expertise. Passionate about turning complex data into reliable, user-focused applications.
summary.after: Data Engineer with proven expertise in building scalable data pipelines and backend services. Proficient in Python, SQL, and PostgreSQL, with hands-on experience in developing ETL processes and optimizing data workflows. Committed to transforming complex data into actionable insights through innovative engineering practices.

description.before:
• Built and maintained backend services and REST APIs in Python/Django supporting secure internal workflows for financial and compliance teams.
• Collaborated with senior engineers on system design, requirements, and architecture, contributing to scalable service patterns and data modeling.
• Developed React dashboards integrated with Django APIs, improving visibility into backend data workflows and operational metrics.
• Optimized Python data-processing pipelines and PostgreSQL queries, improving system scalability and reducing latency by ~40%.
description.after:
• Built REST APIs in Python/Django to support secure data workflows for financial compliance, improving operational efficiency.
• Collaborated with senior engineers on system design and architecture, contributing to scalable service patterns and data modeling.
• Developed React dashboards integrated with Django APIs, enhancing visibility into backend data workflows and operational metrics.
• Optimized Python data-processing pipelines and PostgreSQL queries, achieving a ~40% reduction in latency.

description.before:
• Built and deployed a full-stack finance application that automates account aggregation, transaction tracking, and spending insights across a unified dashboard.
• Designed FastAPI services and PostgreSQL schemas for Plaid integrations, enabling reliable transaction processing and normalized data storage.
• Developed responsive React dashboards and authentication flows for account management, transaction review, and financial analytics.
• Implemented authentication and secure data handling (OAuth/JWT), ensuring protected access to financial data and user account workflows.
• Made it secure n stuff.
description.after:
• Developed a full-stack finance application that automates account aggregation and transaction tracking, providing insights through a unified dashboard.
• Designed FastAPI services and PostgreSQL schemas for Plaid integrations, ensuring reliable transaction processing.
• Created responsive React interfaces for user account management and financial analytics, improving user engagement.
• Implemented secure data handling protocols (OAuth/JWT) to protect sensitive financial information.

before.title: Taylor.io – Resume Builder & Parser
before.description:
• Built an AI-powered resume platform that automates parsing of PDF/DOCX files into structured, editable profile data.
• Implemented backend services for parsing, authentication, and export workflows using FastAPI and PostgreSQL.
• Created a live editing and preview experience in React, enabling users to customize resume content in real time through  a clean, guided interface.
• Integrated OpenAI API for structured parsing and content generation, enabling automated resume extraction and  editing workflows.

before.title: SecureScape – Smart Security System
before.description:
• Developed the Flutter mobile app with core controls including alarm toggling, lighting, photo capture, and recording  access.
• Built the Python backend and communication layer for device coordination, enabling reliable messaging and near real time alerts (<3.5s).

before.title: ShelfVision - Dense Shelf Object Detection
before.description:
• Detects products in crowded retail shelf photos using ResNet-50 and FPN features.
• Handles overlapping items with smart anchor matching and IoU-based detection algorithms.
• Benchmarked on SKU-110K dataset with comprehensive metrics and YOLOv5 comparisons.

before.title: Tizirsso Racing – Portfolio & Sponsorship Website
before.description:
• Built a custom motorsport portfolio site translating brand identity and racing history into a polished, mobile-first  experience.
• Developed interactive UI sections including an animated hero, editorial about page, career timeline, team history,  championship highlights, and image galleries with lightbox support.

before.title: SentimentTrader -  Real-Time Stock Sentiment Pipeline
before.description:
• Designed and implemented an end-to-end production-style ML data pipeline for real-time sentiment analytics, processing 1K+ Reddit finance posts per run via multi-stage ETL.
• Applied NLP models (FinBERT) and feature engineering to build 40+ predictive features per ticker; trained XGBoost models achieving 55–70% ROC-AUC.
• Built modular components for data ingestion, transformation, model inference, and distributed-style batching, aligned with message-driven architectures.
• Automated end-to-end data collection, preprocessing, and model inference workflows, enabling scalable real-time analytics.
